'''Fewash Welko''' was a [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] member of the [[Order of Shasa]]. He was one of the Shasan adepts who, shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], met a [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|dark-suited Human Jedi]] and was convinced to [[Battle of Ahto|rise up]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces occupying [[Ahto City]]. Welko was one of the two hundred Shasans who engaged in the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]-fueled massacre, and afterward was informed by the "[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]" that they now served the same master.

He eventually wrote the book, ''[[The Battle of Ahto: A Memoir]]''.
